news.t: Solve the Cash Conundrum With Highly Rated CLO ETFs
Fidelity Investments® Expands Active ETF Lineup With Two CLO ETFs: Fidelity AAA CLO ETF (FAAA) and Fidelity CLO ETF (FCLO)

overview.description: The Fidelity AAA CLO ETF (FAAA) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is actively managed, investing primarily in  AAA-rated CLO tranches. The fund may allocate up to 25% in non-US dollar-denominated CLOs, with foreign currency exposures typically hedged. FAAA was launched on Feb 12, 2026 and is issued by Fidelity.
